dimensions.label: Novelty
dimensions.score_1: Restates known memory or obvious project language.
dimensions.score_3: Adds a small new angle or recombination.
dimensions.score_5: Creates a genuinely new frame that is not already present in memory.

dimensions.label: Connection
dimensions.score_5: Creates a distant but coherent structural mapping.

dimensions.label: Usefulness
dimensions.score_1: Does not help the project decide anything.
dimensions.score_5: Directly changes what should be done next.

dimensions.label: Coherence
dimensions.score_3: Mostly clear with some weak transitions.

dimensions.label: Evidence Grounding
dimensions.score_1: Abstract only, no project artifact grounding.
dimensions.score_5: Separates observed facts from interpretation using visible artifacts.

dimensions.label: Anti-Recursion
dimensions.score_5: Interrupts recursion with a concrete return path to artifact, behavior, or test.

dimensions.label: Behavioral Delta
dimensions.score_5: Smallest concrete next-run behavior change is proposed.

dimensions.label: Compression Quality
dimensions.score_5: Dense reusable rule that can guide future runs.

dimensions.label: Future Leverage
dimensions.score_5: Improves the probability that the next round will think better.

penalties.trigger: Claims execution without touched files or an execution receipt.
More than two consecutive meta-levels without returning to artifact, behavior, or test.
Reads opponent output before independent output is sealed.
Proposed mutation cannot be classified by safety rules.
Duplicates existing memory without adding a new edge.
Independent output lacks a disconfirming condition.
Independent output lacks a compressed rule.

tie_rule.above_36: merge as one memory with two perspectives

memory_alignment.quarantine: All duel-winning memories are quarantined for one subsequent round.
